prompt: Cinematic Hollywood film still of a {argument name="subject" default="dark-skinned woman"} in a rainy neon cyberpunk city at night, framed as a medium full-body portrait with the subject crouching low in the street, one knee raised and one arm resting casually on it, facing camera with a confident, calm presence. Shot on ARRI Alexa 65 with Panavision anamorphic lenses, subtle organic Kodak Vision3 film grain, shallow depth of field, creamy oval bokeh, dramatic volumetric cinematic lighting, high contrast, glossy reflections, premium blockbuster color grading. The subject has dark curly hair pulled up in a messy high tied style with loose wet strands, 1 visible dangling metallic earring, and minimal visible cybernetic facial circuitry with 2 glowing eye implants implied by the cybernetic design. Outfit has 3 key pieces: a metallic {argument name="jacket color" default="purple"} bomber jacket with bright {argument name="led trim color" default="neon blue"} LED piping tracing the collar, zipper line, chest seam, and both sleeves; a dark inner top; and black designer tactical pants with fitted panels and 2 visible buckle straps around the knee and thigh area. Add 1 illuminated tech module on the upper sleeve of the jacket. Background is a dense futuristic alley or street canyon with tall blurred buildings, wet atmosphere, vertical neon signage in cyan, magenta, blue, and warm amber, soft fog, and distant practical lights. Emphasize glossy fabric texture, rain-slick urban mood, moody blue-purple palette, realistic skin detail, luxe sci-fi fashion editorial energy, and a photoreal cinematic portrait aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 好莱坞电影剧照风格，画面主体为一位 {argument name="subject" default="深色皮肤女性"}，置身于雨夜中霓虹闪烁的赛博朋克城市。构图为中景全身肖像，主体蹲伏在街道上，单膝抬起，一只手臂随意地搭在膝盖上，正对镜头，神情自信而从容。使用 ARRI Alexa 65 搭配 Panavision 变形镜头拍摄，带有细腻的 Kodak Vision3 胶片颗粒感，浅景深，奶油般柔和的椭圆形焦外成像，戏剧性的体积光照明，高对比度，光泽感反射，顶级大片级调色。主体留着深色卷发，扎成凌乱的高马尾，湿润的发丝散落在脸颊旁，佩戴 1 只显眼的金属吊坠耳环，面部带有极简的赛博格电路设计，通过赛博格设计暗示其拥有 2 只发光的眼部植入物。服装包含 3 个关键部分：一件金属质感的 {argument name="jacket color" default="紫色"} 飞行员夹克，领口、拉链线、胸部接缝及双袖处饰有明亮的 {argument name="led trim color" default="霓虹蓝"} LED 灯带；内搭深色上衣；以及黑色设计师战术长裤，带有贴合的拼接设计，膝盖和大腿处可见 2 条扣带。夹克上袖处增加 1 个发光的科技模块。背景为密集的未来主义小巷或街道峡谷，高耸的建筑呈现虚化效果，雨雾弥漫，青色、洋红色、蓝色和暖琥珀色的垂直霓虹招牌，轻柔的雾气，以及远处的实用灯光。强调光泽感的面料质感、雨后湿润的城市氛围、忧郁的蓝紫色调、真实的皮肤细节、奢华的科幻时尚大片质感以及照片级的电影肖像美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 电影感赛博朋克女性肖像：一款照片级写实的电影感赛博朋克肖像提示词，用于生成置身于未来城市、充满时尚霓虹光影且具备电影剧照质感的女性角色。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: full-body, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, editorial, sci-fi, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon, volumetric, high contrast, shallow depth, depth of field, film grain]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
